name: Nicky's Favourite Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
3 3/4 cups if measured before sifting
Cream the butter and sugar together until silky smooth. Add the sifted dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) and mix until just combined.
Turn out onto a lightly floured pastry cloth and use lightly floured hands to gather into one lump. Pat it gently into an 8-inch square on a lightly floured surface, about 1/3 inch thick. Use a large knife or spatula to square off the edges, then smooth with a rolling pin.
Cut into 1-inch squares, placing a sliver of cherry in each. Bake at 350°F for 15-18 minutes until just pale brown on the bottom. Be careful not to overbake, as they burn easily.
Remove from the oven and let cool on wire racks covered with waxed paper. Store in an airtight container; flavor mellowes over time and keeps for weeks at room temperature.
